"[21] DUP : NB 15 AT DUNCAN CANYON - MC INVOLVED - WHI NISS ALT 9XFY761 - XRAY ROAD RAGED W/ RP - RP YELLED AT HER SINCE HE WAS SPLITTING LANES AND SHE ENTERED FWY TAKING 3 LANES AT A TIME AND CUT OFF RP CAUSING TC - TOLD RP SORRY AND TOOK OFF TELLING HIM SHE COULDNT STOP - RP CHASED HER AND GOT HER TO STOP - BOTH NOW ON RS [Shared]"
